creatives.headline: Things that aren't a personality trait: anxiety.
creatives.caption: "I'm just a worrier" is not a diagnosis. It's a coping narrative. You deserve more than a label you gave yourself.

creatives.headline: The most productive thing you can do today might be nothing.
creatives.caption:

creatives.headline: 3am thoughts hit different.
creatives.caption:

Tag someone who needs to hear this.

creatives.headline: Setting a boundary isn't mean. It's a complete sentence.

creatives.headline: Going to therapy doesn't mean you're broken. It means you refuse to stay stuck.

creatives.headline: Your inner child didn't get what they needed. Your adult self can.

creatives.headline: You don't need more motivation. You need less shame.

creatives.headline: Hot take: 'Just be positive' is the worst advice in human history.
